name: Baked Graham-Cracker Crumb Crust (9 Inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. If making your own graham-cracker crumbs, pulverize crackers in a blender or food processor with the knife blade attached as manufacturer directs; or place them in a sturdy plastic bag and roll into fine crumbs with a rolling pin.
2. In a pie plate or bowl, mix crumbs with remaining ingredients. Set aside 3 tablespoons mixture for topping. Press mixture onto bottom and up side of pie plate.
3. Bake crust 8 minutes; cool on wire rack. Fill as recipe directs or with chilled pie filling; top with reserved crumb mixture or garnish as recipe directs.
